title: cynoglossum lanceolatum subsp. geometricum
intro: Cynoglossum lanceolatum subsp. geometricum, also known as Chinese forget-me-not, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the borage family (Boraginaceae) that is native to China. This plant has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Cynoglossum lanceolatum subsp. geometricum include reducing fever, relieving rheumatism, and promoting wound healing. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and it is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
